name: RDVA, Inc.
summary: RDVA, Inc. designs and manufactures foam packaging and products in the United States. The company offers various custom protective packaging products; packaging products, including corner pads, edge pads, and specialty items; standard and specialty insulated containers; and specialty components and shapes. Its products are used in various industries, which include high technology, agriculture, telecommunications, consumer electronics, automotive, appliances, building products, military, textile, furniture, pharmaceuticals, agriculture, medical, perishable foods, wine and beer, food and beverage, and manufacturing industries. RDVA, Inc. was founded in 1962 and is based in Radford, Virginia.
